name: Maya Alvarez
personality: Maya is quick‑witted but patient, juggling orders with a calm smile even during the lunch rush. She grew up in Queens and loves sharing bite‑size trivia about the city with regulars.
quirk: She always wears a tiny silver charm shaped like a subway token on her apron.
daily: Clock in at 6 am, prep the counter, serve breakfast rush, brief lunch lull, then close up while humming old salsa tunes.
